titles.title: Humble Yourself in the Sight of the Lord

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v1

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Humble yourself in the sight of the Lord. Humble yourself in the sight of the Lord;

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And He will lift you up, And He will lift you up.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Amazing grace, how sweet the sound. Amazing grace, how sweet the sound,

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: That saved a wretch like me! That saved a wretch like me!

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I once was lost but now I’m found. I once was lost but now I’m found,

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Was blind but now I see; Was blind but now I see.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: When we’ve been there ten thousand years, When we’ve been there ten thousand years

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Bright shining as the sun; Bright shining as the sun.

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: We've no less days to sing God's praise, We've no less days to sing God's praise

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Than when we've first begun; Than when we've first begun.
